title: Quand la femme s'en mêle
actors: Edwige Feuillère, Jean Servais, Bernard Blier
plot: Henri Godot (Jean Servais) is the owner of a night-club in Paris. He hires young hit man Jo (Alain Delon) to kill his arch rival Boby. But Jo gets entangled with the intriguing femme fatale, Angele aka Maine (Edwige Feuillère), wh...
